anomalies.message: Cross-precision candidate shows less than 10% latency improvement, so the expected precision speedup was not observed.

explanations: Cross-precision candidate shows less than 10% latency improvement, so the expected precision speedup was not observed.
recommendations: Verify that the TensorRT engine was actually built and executed with the expected reduced precision.
Check runtime_artifact_path, engine build settings, and operator precision fallback.
Repeat profiling to rule out measurement variance or device load effects.
